# DeepCoin.Net

> Strongly typed .NET client library for the DeepCoin REST and WebSocket APIs. Supports DeepCoin spot and swap/futures market data, account endpoints, trading endpoints, private user streams, local order book support, and CryptoExchange.Net SharedApis integration.

DeepCoin.Net is part of the CryptoExchange.Net ecosystem. It uses the standard CryptoExchange.Net result model, strongly typed enums and models, automatic WebSocket reconnect handling, client-side rate limiting, dependency injection integration, and native AOT support. REST methods return `HttpResult<T>` / `HttpResult`, WebSocket subscriptions return `WebSocketResult<UpdateSubscription>`, and selected shared helper methods return `ExchangeCallResult<T>`. Current version in this repository: 3.9.2. Targets netstandard2.0, netstandard2.1, net8.0, net9.0, net10.0.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/README.md): Overview, installation, supported features, usage examples, release notes
- [Documentation Site](https://cryptoexchange.jkorf.dev/DeepCoin.Net/): Full documentation hub including client reference, WebSocket subscriptions, dependency injection, and shared interfaces
- [AI API Quick Map](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/docs/ai-api-map.md): Table-style intent-to-method map for routing common user requests to the correct client member
- [Full LLM Context](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/llms-full.txt): Detailed AI/LLM guide with code patterns, endpoint map, common mistakes, and anti-hallucination rules
- [Claude/Codex Skill](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): Assistant-facing usage guide with examples and pitfalls

## Examples

- [AI-friendly examples directory](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/tree/main/Examples/ai-friendly): Compact, fully runnable examples optimized for AI assistants and quick onboarding
- [Spot Quickstart](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/01-spot-quickstart.cs): Client setup, ticker lookup, balances, limit spot order, order status and cancellation
- [Swap/Futures Trading](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/02-futures.cs): Set leverage, place swap order, retrieve position, reduce-only close
- [WebSocket Streams](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/03-websocket.cs): Public ticker/trade/kline/order book streams and authenticated user stream
- [Multi-Exchange Pattern](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/04-multi-exchange.cs): Using CryptoExchange.Net SharedApis and shared capability discovery for exchange-agnostic code
- [Error Handling](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/Examples/ai-friendly/05-error-handling.cs): HttpResult, WebSocketResult, and ExchangeCallResult patterns, retry logic, common errors and their handling
- [Full Examples Repository](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/tree/main/Examples): Console, API, order book, and tracker examples

## Critical Rules

- Use `DeepCoinRestClient` for REST and `DeepCoinSocketClient` for WebSocket.
- Use `DeepCoinCredentials("key", "secret", "pass")`, not generic `ApiCredentials`.
- Use `restClient.ExchangeApi.ExchangeData`, `.Account`, and `.Trading`; do not invent `SpotApi` or futures-specific root branches.
- Native DeepCoin methods use symbols such as `ETH-USDT` and `ETH-USDT-SWAP`.
- Always check `.Success` before reading `.Data`.
- Use `socketClient.UnsubscribeAsync(subscription.Data)` for teardown.
- Private WebSocket streams require `restClient.ExchangeApi.Account.StartUserStreamAsync()`.
- For cross-exchange code, use `CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis` via `.ExchangeApi.SharedClient` and call `.Discover()` to inspect supported shared features.

## Reference

- [CryptoExchange.Net base library](https://github.com/JKorf/CryptoExchange.Net): Base abstractions used by DeepCoin.Net and other exchange libraries
- [CryptoClients.Net](https://github.com/JKorf/CryptoClients.Net): Bundle package providing unified access to all exchange libraries
- [NuGet Package](https://www.nuget.org/packages/DeepCoin.Net): Latest stable release on NuGet
- [Changelog](https://github.com/JKorf/DeepCoin.Net/blob/main/README.md#release-notes): Version history
- [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/MSpeEtSY8t): Maintainer-supported Discord for questions and discussion
